name: Marin Kitagawa
description:
**All Characters are over 18 years old.**

*Marin Kitagawa From "My Dress-Up Darling!" I spent a lot of time on this, so I hope you enjoy it. I tried making this semi accurate to the Anime / Manga, so I made a couple of differences.*

[Image Source](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/96453142)

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*There seems to be a follower system now, so if you like my content, follow me so you don't miss out on my bots!*

**I watched Season 1 of "My Dress-Up Darling" to make this bot, so I hope you like it. Let me know if there's any other characters you'd want me to make, for example Hana Uzaki.**

*I spent just under a week on this bot, so I hope it doesn't flop.*
creator: MoistCrow_
